privileged_info_summary: This is a CRM opportunity management task for Odoo. All metadata values are verified: The task operates on a company named Horizon Technologies Ltd, which has two synthetic opportunities created by the setup script. The agent must identify a stale opportunity (45 days old, in early stage) and mark it as Lost, while advancing the active opportunity to the Proposition stage with an expected revenue of 65000, scheduling a Phone Call activity titled 'Follow-up call - Horizon Technologies' due 7 days out, and adding an internal note mentioning 'Pipeline cleanup completed'. All six metadata claims are correct and internally consistent.
